description: Zero-LLM hybrid retrieval engine. BM25 + census scoring (6-1-6 adjacency co-occurrence counts). Deterministic quality gates, anchor reranking, grounding policy. No embeddings. No model calls. Ever.

regime_flags.LAKESPEAK_NO_LLM: Absolute. Zero model calls in LakeSpeak, ingest or query.
regime_flags.LAKESPEAK_TWO_SPEC_SEPARATION: FormatDetector and GlueEngine are independent builds.
